title: aspidium decurrens var. minor
intro: Aspidium decurrens var. minor, also known as the lesser cinnamon fern or cinnamon fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the cinnamon fern can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
